patch:
--- a/comparator.v
+++ b/comparator.v
@@ -1,13 +1,13 @@
 module comparator(
   input [63:0] value_x,
   input [63:0] value_y,
   output reg equal_flag,
   output reg greater_flag
 );
 
-  always @(value_x)
+  always @(value_x or value_y)
   begin
     equal_flag = (value_x == value_y);
     greater_flag = (value_x > value_y);
   end
 
 endmodule
